description: relations.json dry-run parity (the 4 relation ops). Library: add opts?:{dryRun?} to appendRelationByRef/removeRelationByRef/replaceRelationByRef/appendRelationsByRef (context-sdk.ts) threaded to their *ForDir cores; when dryRun, load + resolve selectors + build prospective Edge[] + run the same relations-schema validation and endpointIdentity dedup the write path uses (bulk: on-disk AND in-batch; replace: new-edge collision) and return without writeRelations (result gains dryRun:true). Ops (ops-registry.ts append/remove/replace/append-relations): declare dryRun + thread + would-message. Scripts: delete bespoke preview, call byRef with {dryRun:true}, print in [dry-run] PASS convention. CHANGELOG [Unreleased] bullet. Mirror the canonical amendConfigEntry(...,{dryRun}) pattern. Per DEC-0008 / FGAP-012.
